title: soroseris hookeriana subsp. handelii
intro: Soroseris hookeriana subsp. handelii, also known as the 'Tibetan thistle', is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Asteraceae. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in digestion. Soroseris hookeriana subsp. handelii is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions by boiling its leaves or roots in water to make use of its medicinal properties.
